records.title: Ease Into Sleep with a Weighted Shoulder and Neck Wrap
records.description: The Sleepymoon wrap uses gentle pressure across your shoulders and neck to help ease tension before bed. A calming wind-down addition to any sleep routine.

records.title: Calm Shoulder Tension at Bedtime with a Weighted Wrap
records.description: This weighted shoulder and neck wrap applies gentle, even pressure — the kind that takes the edge off a tense evening and makes it easier to settle for sleep.

records.title: Wind Down Faster: Weighted Shoulder and Neck Wrap for Anxious Sleepers
records.description: Weighted pressure across the neck and shoulders can help signal to your body it's time to rest. Useful for anyone who finds it hard to switch off before bed.

records.title: Release Neck and Shoulder Tension Before Bed | Weighted Wrap
records.description: The Sleepymoon weighted wrap sits across your shoulders and neck, applying gentle pressure where most people carry daily tension. A useful addition to a wind-down routine.

records.title: Ease Neck and Shoulder Tension Before Sleep | Weighted Wrap
records.description: Weighted shoulder wraps apply gentle pressure to the spots that hold the most tension — useful if tightness in your upper body makes it hard to get comfortable at night.

records.title: Less Tension, Better Sleep: Weighted Shoulder and Neck Wrap
records.description: The weighted drape sits across your upper body, helping ease the physical tension that can make it hard to settle. Good for anyone who moves around a lot through the night.

records.title: Settle Faster at Night with a Weighted Shoulder Wrap
records.description: A weighted wrap across your shoulders and neck adds a layer of calm to your wind-down routine — gentle pressure that helps your body shift into sleep mode.

records.title: A Calmer Bedtime Starts with Reducing Shoulder Tension
records.description: This neck and shoulder wrap applies gentle weight to help you relax before sleep — less fidgeting, less time lying awake, more consistency in your sleep routine.

records.title: Better Wind-Down: Weighted Shoulder Wrap for Light Sleepers
records.description: Weighted pressure across the neck and shoulders takes some of the edge off a busy mind. A small addition to your sleep routine that can make a real difference for light sleepers.
